title: Hashima Project
original_title: ฮาชิมะ โปรเจกต์ ไม่เชื่อ ต้องลบหลู่
overview: A group of teenagers will now step foot on this island to capture paranormal encounters on tape. On the island, the teenagers are thrilled as they explore. However, their excitement is short-lived. They realize something ominous is creeping up on them and the hair-raising truth unveils through the lens of the camera.
